message:
feat(runtime): add Bayesian GPD tail latency estimation

Implements Generalized Pareto Distribution (GPD) modeling for rare-event
tail latency estimation. Features:
- GpdParameters: quantile and survival probability computation
- BayesianGpdEstimator: Peaks Over Threshold with Bayesian shrinkage
- GpdQuantileEstimate: credible intervals for extreme quantiles (P99.9+)
- Method of moments fitting with prior regularization

Closes franken_networkx-tw77

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
